column1: # Combined BOM — split-flap v2 hand-off package

column5: Mornsun K7803-500R3 (RECOM R-78E3.3-0.5 / CUI V7803-500 alt)
column7: **Switching buck module — NOT a linear LDO**. 12V→3.3V at ~200 mA in SOT-89 LDO would dissipate 1.74 W (rated ~0.5 W) → thermal shutdown. The 3-pin SIP buck is a sealed drop-in.
Sized for 15 A continuous; NTD2955 alt. AOD409 VGS rated ±20 V (no clamp strictly required) but a 12 V Zener clamp (Z1) parallels the unit Q1 fix and absorbs brick over-voltage.
Q1 VGS clamp — cathode → source (+12V_RAIL), anode → gate. Optional on master (AOD409 ±20 V) but recommended for symmetry with unit Q1 + brick over-voltage.
Q1 gate series resistor (slows turn-on; isolates Z1 clamp current)
Q1 gate pull-down to GND (replaces earlier R_q1_gate)
Per-row 12 V output protection. **2920 (NOT 1812)** — MF-MSMF 1812 family does not support 4 A hold; 2920 is the smallest viable package.
Input TVS unidirectional. Cathode (banded) → +12V (post-fuse), anode → GND. Place AFTER F1 fuse so a sustained TVS clamp opens the fuse.
12 V/15 A input. **NOT** Phoenix MKDS 1.5/2 (rated only 8 A). KF7.62-2P is 16 A; DECA MA231-50002M (LCSC C237691) is 15 A 5 mm pitch alt.
Bus 0 row port: 12V/A/B/GND. JST-VH (≥5 A per pin) — NOT JST-XH (3 A; undersized for 4 A row fuse). Locked across system per OPEN_DECISIONS #4.
Bus 1 row port (same MPN as J3).
Bus 2 row port (same MPN as J3).
Bus 3 row port (same MPN as J3).
UART/SPI debug breakout. Replace earlier C124378 reference (C124378 is 1x40 single-row strip — wrong). If a 2x4 LCSC code is awkward, drop J7 and use labeled test pads on the SPI/UART nets instead.
Buck module input cap (per K7803/R-78E datasheet 4.7-10 uF X7R; 1206 ensures JLC-stocked X7R availability)
SC16IS740 VDD decoupling (single 3V3 supply at pin 1; no separate VDD_io on SC16IS740IPW)
SN65HVD75 Vcc decoupling — one per PHY (U4/U5/U6/U7) close to pin 8
B bias to GND per bus
Row PWR LED current limit (12V hardwired)

column1: # UNIT PCB BOM (×64 per system — one per flap unit)

column7: **SOIC-16 narrow** — both TPL7407L (C383290) and ULN2003A (C2358) ship in 150 mil narrow SOIC. NOT SOIC-16W (300 mil) — pads will not bridge the IC's leads.

**Replaces HT7833** — HT7833 is 6.5 V max VIN, would be destroyed at 12 V. LDL1117S33 is 40 V max VIN, 1.2 A. Dissipation at 55 mA = 0.48 W; SOT-223 with copper pour heatsink (~1 cm² on bottom layer GND tab) holds Tj < 50 °C above ambient.

3-pin header for external hall module on flying lead. **Pinout LOCKED: pin 1 = +3V3, pin 2 = GND, pin 3 = HALL_OUT** (KY-003 native order — v1 cable plugs straight in). Sensor positioned by chassis bracket relative to flap drum magnet.
VGS rated only ±12 V — at 12 V brick the gate-source margin is zero. Z1 12 V Zener clamp REQUIRED to keep AO3401 in spec under brick tolerance + transients.
Q1 VGS clamp — cathode → source (PCB-12V), anode → gate node. Required for AO3401A within ±12 V VGS rating.
Q1 gate series resistor (slows turn-on; isolates Z1 clamp current)
Unidirectional. Cathode (banded) → +12V, anode → GND. Reversed = forward-bias = dead short.

Primary: Mill-Max 0906-2 (5 mm free / 1-1.4 mm travel / 1.07 mm Au tip / 2 A / 1M cycles). Backup: 0906-1. LCSC fallback: Xinyangze YZ02015095R-01 (C5157439) with current derate. **4 pins only — no PG_KEY 5th polarization pogo** (collided with PG1; polarization moved to DIN clip).

**Asymmetric clip is the ONLY polarization mechanism** — only one orientation engages the rail. Bolts via 4× M3 holes at unit board (3,3) (3,77) (37,77) (37,3). One printed per unit (64 + spares). MakerWorld STL link in build notes.

column8: pin 5 = +12 V common (red wire). 5-pin avoids 64× hand-splicing the +12 V wire into the chassis harness.

column7: 12 V input bulk — 1206 required for X7R availability at 22 uF / 25 V; 0805 in this combination is effectively vaporware on JLC
DE driver line series (PA12 → SN65HVD75 DE; /RE tied to GND so no R_re)

column1: # BUS PCB BOM (×8 per system — 2 daisy-chained per row × 4 rows)

column7: Connector "in" (master side or chain-from-previous). 3.96 mm pitch, ≥5 A per pin (matches 4 A row fuse). NOT JST-XH (3 A undersized). Locked across system per OPEN_DECISIONS #4.
Connector "out" (chain-to-next or terminator end). Same MPN as J_in.

2-layer FR-4 ENIG plating; 4 traces (12V/A/B/GND) at y = 4 / 12 / 20 / 28 mm from top edge with widened pogo contact zones + isolated PG_KEY ENIG polarization pad (3x3 mm at y = 2 mm) at 8 stations per board. Width 32 mm (was 30) so trace Y-offsets exactly match unit pogo geometry.
For attaching bus PCB to 35 mm DIN rail TS35 (off-shelf or 3D-printed)
